title: Ancient Mesoamerica
description: Test your knowledge of ancient Mesoamerica!

assessment_items.question_content:
So far, all the evidence we have for Olmec civilization comes from

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Scholars haven’t found evidence of writing in the Olmec civilization.
Olmec trading did not deal exclusively with agricultural products

choices.content: was confined to the cities of San Lorenzo and La Venta

assessment_items.question_content:
Which of the following best explains the role of monumental architecture, such as the colossal heads and the pyramid at La Venta, in Olmec society?

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Ancient societies usually built monumental architecture for particular reasons.

choices.content: They were probably used to frighten and warn their enemies
They were probably artwork and architecture with no deeper meaning or purpose
They were probably used to both pay tribute to political leaders and perform religious rites

assessment_items.question_content:
Which of the following best explains why the Olmec civilization was forced to leave its homeland?

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: We don’t have evidence of the collapse of the Olmec government

choices.content: Environmental changes, such as silting of rivers, or volcanic activity
Economic factors, such as reduced trade
Political problems, such as the collapse of Olmec government

assessment_items.question_content:
The food production practices of the Olmec can best be described as

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: The Olmec were not pastoralists because they did not rely exclusively on herding livestock.
